initial_program:
n_rows(N) :- N = #count{ R : input(R, _, _) }.
n_cols(M) :- M = #count{ C : input(_, C, _) }.
row(R) :- n_rows(N), R < N.
col(C) :- n_cols(M), C < M.
zero_cell(R, C) :- row(R), col(C), n_rows(N), (N - #count{ R2 : input(R2, C, Color), Color != 0 } ) > R.
bottomK(C, K, Color) :- input(R, C, Color), Color != 0, row(R), col(C), K = #count{ R2 : R2 > R, input(R2, C, Color2), Color2 != 0 }.
nonzero(R, C, Color) :- bottomK(C, K, Color), n_rows(N), (N - 1) - K = R, row(R), col(C).
:- zero_cell(R, C), output(R, C, Color), Color != 0.
:- zero_cell(R, C), nonzero(R, C, Color).
1 { output(R, C, Color) : color(Color) } 1 :- zero_cell(R, C).
1 { output(R, C, Color) : color(Color) } 1 :- nonzero(R, C, Color).
#show output/3.

rounds.program_after:
n_rows(N) :- N = #count{ R : input(R, _, _) }.
n_cols(M) :- M = #count{ C : input(_, C, _) }.
row(R) :- n_rows(N), R < N.
col(C) :- n_cols(M), C < M.
zero_cell(R, C) :- row(R), col(C), n_rows(N), N - #count{R2 : input(R2, C, Color), Color != 0} > R.
bottomK(C, K, Color) :- input(R, C, Color), Color != 0, row(R), col(C), K = #count{ R2 : R2 > R, input(R2, C, Color2), Color2 != 0 }.
nonzero(R, C, Color) :- bottomK(C, K, Color), n_rows(N), (N - 1) - K = R, row(R), col(C).
:- zero_cell(R, C), output(R, C, Color), Color != 0.
:- zero_cell(R, C), nonzero(R, C, Color).
1 { output(R, C, Color) : color(Color) } 1 :- zero_cell(R, C).
1 { output(R, C, Color) : color(Color) } 1 :- nonzero(R, C, Color).
#show output/3.

final_program:
n_rows(N) :- N = #count{ R : input(R, _, _) }.
n_cols(M) :- M = #count{ C : input(_, C, _) }.
row(R) :- n_rows(N), R < N.
col(C) :- n_cols(M), C < M.
zero_cell(R, C) :- row(R), col(C), n_rows(N), N - #count{R2 : input(R2, C, Color), Color != 0} > R.
bottomK(C, K, Color) :- input(R, C, Color), Color != 0, row(R), col(C), K = #count{ R2 : R2 > R, input(R2, C, Color2), Color2 != 0 }.
nonzero(R, C, Color) :- bottomK(C, K, Color), n_rows(N), (N - 1) - K = R, row(R), col(C).
:- zero_cell(R, C), output(R, C, Color), Color != 0.
:- zero_cell(R, C), nonzero(R, C, Color).
1 { output(R, C, Color) : color(Color) } 1 :- zero_cell(R, C).
1 { output(R, C, Color) : color(Color) } 1 :- nonzero(R, C, Color).
#show output/3.
